column1: Luis Arraez stands out as the top pick, leading off at home with a strong recent hit rate and a favorable platoon advantage against Michael Lorenzen. Jeremy Pena offers steady reliability in the leadoff spot and also benefits from a soft matchup, making him a solid secondary option. Michael Harris II and Otto Lopez both hold platoon edges, but their recent consistency lags behind the top two choices. Arraez’s combination of consistency and matchup makes him the clear priority for Beat The Streak.
